akis.title: Feed
akis.sendGreetingDesc: Create a special card for your loved ones.
akis.announcementDemo: Welcome to SELAYA! With the new Feed tab, your daily verse, hadith and tasks are all in one place.

tasks.title: Daily Tasks
tasks.allDone: Mashallah! You completed all of today's tasks.

kaza.title: Missed Prayers
kaza.desc: Track the prayers you owe and reduce the count (−) as you make them up. Bulk add adds days to every prayer.

homeLayout.title: Customize Home
homeLayout.desc: Hold the ⠿ handle on the left to drag and reorder. Toggle to show/hide. Use ↺ (top right) to reset. Changes apply instantly.

featuredEdit.title: Featured Content
featuredEdit.desc: Which tools appear? Hold the ⠿ handle to drag, toggle to add/remove. Use ↺ to reset.

widgetsGallery.title: Widgets
widgetsGallery.hadithDesc: A hadith on your home screen every day.
widgetsGallery.timesDesc: Next prayer and countdown on your home screen.
widgetsGallery.steps: Long-press an empty area on your home screen → "Widgets" → find SELAYA → drag the widget you want onto your home screen.
widgetsGallery.ayahDesc: A verse on your home screen; tap for the next.
widgetsGallery.esmaDesc: The beautiful names; tap for the next name.
widgetsGallery.hijriDesc: Today's Hijri and Gregorian date on your home screen.
widgetsGallery.clockMinimalDesc: A clean, large time and date (2×2).

onboarding.languageSubtitle: You can change it anytime in settings
onboarding.slide1Desc: Prayer times, Quran, Qibla, dhikr and more — in one elegant app.
onboarding.slide2Desc: Daily verses, hadith and duas; with stories and premium wallpapers.
onboarding.slide3Desc: Share prayers on the Dua Wall, join community Khatms, and climb the quiz leaderboard.
onboarding.permissionLocationDesc: We need your location for accurate prayer times and Qibla direction where you are.
onboarding.locationResolveFailed: Couldn't determine your location — you can pick your city manually in Settings.
onboarding.permissionNotifDesc: Never miss the Adhan and prayer reminders.
onboarding.permissionBatteryDesc: Exempt SELAYA from battery optimization so alarms and notifications arrive exactly on time.
onboarding.methodDesc: Pick the prayer time calculation method for your region.
onboarding.prefsIntro: SELAYA set these up for you. Turn off anything you don't want now, or change it anytime in Settings.
onboarding.prefAlertsDesc: Get the adhan and reminders when each prayer time comes in. Turn off if you prefer — you can re-enable it in Settings.
onboarding.prefOngoingDesc: Always shows the time left until the next prayer in your status bar.
onboarding.prefFullScreenDesc: Fills the screen at prayer time, wakes the phone and plays the adhan.
onboarding.prefAyahDesc: Receive an inspiring verse notification each morning.
onboarding.prefHadithDesc: Receive a hadith notification every day.
onboarding.prefsFooter: Prayer reminders (10 minutes before each prayer) and the adhan sound are ready for you. You can change everything in Settings.
onboarding.termsAccept: I have read and accept the terms of use and privacy policy.
onboarding.termsRequired: You must accept the terms of use to continue.
onboarding.termsBody: By using SELAYA you agree that your location is used only on your device for prayer times and qibla direction, and that your personal data is not shared with third parties. Notifications are sent only for the prayer-time alerts you choose. You can change all preferences anytime in Settings.
onboarding.permissionIntroBody: For the app to work properly and for prayer-time alerts to arrive on time, the following permissions must be granted. If permissions are not granted correctly, alerts may not work properly.
onboarding.locationWarnBody: Set your location or pick your city for accurate prayer times.
onboarding.permWarnBanner: Grant the permissions below for prayer-time alerts and accurate times.
onboarding.permWarnBody: Location and/or notification permission was not granted. Without them, prayer-time alerts and the adhan alarm may not work properly. Do you still want to continue?

intro.tagline: By your side every day on your spiritual journey.
intro.f1Desc: Diyanet-accurate times, Adhan and smart reminders.
intro.f2Desc: Arabic, translation, transliteration and gapless audio.
intro.f3Desc: Precise direction to the Kaaba from where you are.
intro.f4Desc: Verses, hadith, duas, stories and wallpapers.

home.addWidgetDesc: See prayer times and reminders right on your home screen.
home.shareIdeaDesc: Share your ideas and let's grow SELAYA together.
home.audioStoriesDesc: Listen and find peace — plays in the background too.

qibla.title: Qibla Compass
qibla.pointDevice: Hold the phone flat and turn the arrow to the Kaaba
qibla.calibrateHint: Wave the phone in a figure-8 (∞), then hold it flat.
qibla.noSensor: No compass sensor on this device. Use the Sun method.
qibla.sunBelow: The sun is below the horizon now — this method works in daylight.
qibla.sunNow: The sun is now to the {} ({}°).
qibla.sunAligned: The Kaaba is exactly toward the sun.
qibla.sunRight: The Kaaba is {}° right of the sun.
qibla.sunLeft: The Kaaba is {}° left of the sun.
qibla.sunHelpRight: Face the sun, then turn {}° right to find the Kaaba.
qibla.sunHelpLeft: Face the sun, then turn {}° left to find the Kaaba.
qibla.shareText: Qibla from my location: {}° ({}). Distance to the Kaaba: {} km. — SELAYA

settings.title: Settings
settings.locationFailed: Could not get location. Please check permissions.
settings.locationPermBody: Enable location permission for auto-detect. Allow location for SELAYA in your phone Settings.
settings.ayahNotifDesc: Receive a verse of the Qur'an every day.
settings.fullScreenAdhanDesc: Show a screen-filling adhan alarm at prayer time.
settings.checkinPromptDesc: Ask "did you pray?" after each prayer time.
settings.smartSilentDesc: Automatically mute the phone during prayer and Friday times, then restore it.
settings.mosqueSilentDesc: When you open the app near a mosque, the phone is muted automatically and restored when you move away.
settings.mosqueSilentHint: On. Needs Location + Do Not Disturb access. Mutes automatically when you open the app near a mosque.
settings.mosqueSilentDenied: Turned off — location permission was denied.
settings.aboutDesc: SELAYA is a holistic Islamic lifestyle assistant bringing together prayer times, qibla, Quran, dhikr and much more. Share it with your loved ones.
settings.shareAppText: SELAYA — More Than Prayer Times. Discover the Islamic lifestyle assistant!
settings.minuteOffsetDesc: Shift each prayer time by ± minutes.
settings.hijriOffsetDesc: Shift the Hijri date by ± days.
settings.asrHanafiDesc: Calculate Asr per the Hanafi school (double shadow length).
settings.dstDesc: Manually shift all times forward by one hour.
settings.hatimReminderDesc: Remind me to read my daily khatm pages.

notif.title: Prayer Notifications
notif.exactAlarmDesc: Allow alerts to fire exactly on time.
notif.permissionDeniedBody: Prayer notifications need notification permission. Enable notifications for SELAYA in your phone Settings.
notif.exactDeniedBody: Allow the "Alarms & reminders" permission so alerts fire exactly on time.
notif.batteryDesc: Battery saving can delay background alarms. Tap to exempt SELAYA.
notif.batteryDeniedBody: Exempt SELAYA from battery optimization in Settings so alarms arrive exactly on time.
notif.overlayDesc: Allow this so the adhan can show reliably over the lock screen and other apps when a prayer comes in.
notif.overlayDeniedBody: Enable "Display over other apps" in Settings so the full-screen adhan always appears.
notif.fullScreenPermDesc: Required for the adhan alarm to open full-screen and wake the screen while it is LOCKED (Android 14+). If off, only a small notification appears.
notif.guideIntro: Devices like Samsung, Xiaomi and Huawei may sleep apps to save battery and delay or drop background adhan/prayer alarms. To make them dependable:
notif.guideEnableOngoing: First turn on "Persistent Notification" — it keeps SELAYA alive and stops the system from sleeping or killing it.
notif.guideStep1: Grant all the permissions above (notifications, exact alarm, battery exemption, display over apps).
notif.guideStep2: Phone Settings → Apps → SELAYA → Battery → choose "Unrestricted".
notif.guideStep3: Settings → Battery → Background usage limits → remove SELAYA from "Sleeping / Deep sleeping apps".
notif.guideStep4: Settings → Apps → SELAYA → Alarms & reminders → Allow.
notif.testBody: This is how the alert and adhan sound at prayer time.
notif.testSnack: A sample adhan will play in 5 seconds — keep the volume up.
notif.testFired: A sample notification will arrive in 5 seconds — keep the volume up.
notif.testFullScreenScheduled: Full-screen alarm in {}s — LOCK your screen NOW! 🔒
notif.testDelayHint: After choosing, lock the screen; the alarm will open full-screen on the lock screen.
notif.masterToggleDesc: Turn all adhan and prayer-time alerts on or off.
notif.fullScreenAlarmDesc: The adhan opens full-screen at prayer time. When off, only a sounding notification with a Stop button.
notif.fullScreenAlarmNeedsPerm: For the full-screen alarm to work even while the screen is LOCKED, the "Full-screen alarm permission" is required. Enable it now?
notif.fullScreenLockOk: Opens full-screen even when the screen is locked.
notif.fullScreenLockWarn: No permission — won't open full-screen when locked.
notif.refreshTimesDesc: Re-detect location and recompute the prayer times.
notif.kandilDesc: Mawlid, Mi'raj, Bara'at, Qadr nights and the Eids.
notif.cumaDesc: A blessed-Friday and prayer reminder on Friday morning.
notif.ramadanModeDesc: Suhoor (imsak) and iftar notifications, plus the suhoor reminder at İmsak, during Ramadan.
notif.ramadanModeAutoDesc: Turns on by itself during Ramadan
notif.ongoingDesc: Keep the next prayer and countdown always in the status bar.
notif.vibrationDesc: Vibrate the phone on prayer notifications.
notif.ledDesc: Blink the LED when a notification arrives (on supported devices).
notif.atTimeNamed: It's time for {} prayer 🤲 May Allah accept it
notif.atTimeImsak: İmsak has begun — suhoor has ended
notif.ezanDuaReading: Allahumma Rabba hadhihi'd-da'wati't-tammah, was-salati'l-qa'imah, ati Muhammadani'l-wasilata wa'l-fadilah, wab'ath-hu maqaman mahmudani'lladhi wa'adtah.
notif.ezanDuaMeaning: O Allah, Lord of this perfect call and the prayer to be established, grant Muhammad (ﷺ) the intercession and favour, and raise him to the praised station (Maqam Mahmud) that You have promised him.
notif.adhanDisableFullScreenDesc: The full-screen alarm won't show again until you re-enable it.

womens.title: Women's Mode
womens.desc: On special days, prayer & fasting tracking is exempt and your streak is preserved.

quiz.resGood: Nice! A bit more study and you'll ace it.
quiz.resTry: Learning is what matters — try again!
quiz.weeklyDesc: This week's 15 questions — same for everyone, timed. Answer fast and right to climb the leaderboard.
quiz.signInToRank: Sign in to appear on the leaderboard (nickname required).
quiz.emptyBoard: No one has played this week yet. Be the first!

hatim.emptyDesc: Track reading the Quran from start to finish. Set a daily goal and watch your progress.
hatim.abandonBody: Your active khatm will move to history and progress stops. Are you sure?
hatim.completeBody: You read the whole Quran in {} days. May Allah accept it.
hatim.readRestBody: You did not start from page 1. You may also read pages 1-{} if you wish.

report.emailCopied: Couldn’t open email app — address copied to clipboard

xt.muMealEmpty: No translation found for this page.
xt.agSourceNote: Source: based on the Diyanet catechism. Consult qualified sources for detail.
xt.chIntro: Read together: claim an open juz, read it, mark it done. 30 juz completes a khatm.
xt.chSignInToClaim: Sign in to claim a juz
xt.dwErrProfanity: Your prayer seems to contain inappropriate language. Please edit it.
xt.dwErrTooSoon: You are posting too often. Please wait a moment.
xt.dwErrTooManyPending: You have too many prayers awaiting approval.
xt.dwErrRumuzChars: Nickname may contain only letters, numbers, space, dot and _.
xt.dwErrRumuzSacred: Sacred names cannot be used as a nickname.
xt.dwErrRumuzTaken: This nickname is already taken, please choose another.
xt.dwSignInToShare: Please sign in to share a prayer.
xt.dwRumuzDialogDesc: This nickname will be shown instead of your name.
xt.dwReportConfirm: Report this dua as inappropriate? It is auto-hidden after enough reports.
xt.dwEmpty:
No approved prayers yet.
Be the first — tap the box above.
xt.gcPersonalizeHint: A name makes the card greet "Dear …,"; the signature is added at the bottom.
xt.hjSourceNote: Source: based on the Diyanet hajj guide. For details of the rites, consult your guide / qualified sources.
xt.hjTalbiyahMeaning: “Here I am, O Allah, here I am. You have no partner; here I am. Surely all praise, grace and dominion are Yours; You have no partner.”
xt.ilHeroSubtitle: {} answers on the essentials · Hanafi / Diyanet
xt.ilSourceNote: Source: based on the Diyanet catechism. For specific cases, consult qualified sources.
xt.mgSourceNote: Based on the Diyanet (Presidency of Religious Affairs).
xt.muAudioComingSoon: Audio for this surah is coming soon.
xt.muNoInternet: No internet — this surah isn't downloaded yet.
xt.muSourceAttribution: Script: Madani Mushaf (KFGQPC) · Page images: Five-Prayers/quran-pages (GitHub)
xt.ngSourceNote: Source: based on the Diyanet catechism. Consult qualified sources for detail.
xt.qbTip1: Hold the phone flat (parallel to the ground) and turn slowly; you face the qibla when the top arrow meets the Kaaba marker.
xt.qbTip2: Use it away from metal, magnets, speakers and electronics — ideally outdoors.
xt.qbTip3: If accuracy drops, calibrate by moving the phone in a figure-8 in the air.
xt.qbTip4: The compass shows magnetic north; the app corrects for your local magnetic declination to point to the true qibla.
xt.qbTip5: When the compass is unreliable, use the “Qibla by Sun” method below during daytime.
xt.qrOfflineNotDownloaded: No internet — this surah isn't downloaded yet. Listen once online and it plays offline afterwards.
xt.qrFullTextSoon:
Full text for this surah is coming soon.
Common short surahs (Al-Fatiha, Al-Qadr, Al-Fil–An-Nas) are ready.
xt.qsEmptyIntro: Type a meaning, a word, or a surah name to search the whole Quran.
xt.rdEmptyMessage:
No reminders yet.
Add your own dhikr/dua/note reminder.
xt.rdayGreetingKandil: May your holy night be blessed.
xt.rdaySourceDiyanet: Based on the Diyanet (Presidency of Religious Affairs).
xt.rmMukabalaHint: Read one juz a day (start at juz 1)
xt.rmIftarDuaMeaning: "O Allah! For You I fasted and with Your provision I broke my fast."
xt.rmSuhoorIntention: Suhoor intention: "I intend to fast tomorrow's Ramadan fast for the sake of Allah."
xt.rmTaraweehDesc: A confirmed sunnah prayer after isha (20 rakat).
xt.rmQadrDesc: Sought in the last ten nights; better than a thousand months.
xt.rpPlan10Desc: ~60 pages (3 juz) a day. For the last 10 nights of Ramadan.
xt.rpPlan30Desc: 1 juz (~20 pages) a day. Ideal for Ramadan.
xt.rpPlan60Desc: About 10 pages a day. A balanced pace.
xt.rpPlan90Desc: About 7 pages a day. Calm and sustainable.
xt.rpPlan1PageDesc: No rush — one page daily for a lasting habit.
xt.rpHabitMulkDesc: The surah that protects from the grave.
xt.rpHabitYasinDesc: The heart of the Quran; start your day with it.
xt.rpHabitRahmanDesc: The bride of the Quran; recounting His blessings.
xt.rpHabitSajdahDesc: Recommended to recite on Friday night.
xt.rpCustomPlanDesc: Choose how many pages you read per day.
xt.rpFooterNote: Khatm plans use the Hatim tracker that follows your progress. Regular-reading cards open the relevant surah.
xt.rpConfirmReplace: Start a new khatm with this plan? Your active khatm will move to history. ({} pages/day)
xt.rpConfirmStart: Start a khatm with this plan? ({} pages/day)
xt.stHeroStart: Complete all 5 today to start a streak!
xt.tsInfoBody: After each obligatory prayer one says 33× “Subhanallah”, 33× “Alhamdulillah” and 33× “Allahu akbar”, reaching ninety-nine; the hundredth is completed with the tahlil (kalima of monotheism).
xt.tsHadith: “Whoever, after every prayer, glorifies Allah 33 times, praises Him 33 times and magnifies Him 33 times — that is ninety-nine — and completes the hundred with ‘La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah…’, his sins are forgiven even if they were like the foam of the sea.”
xt.tsSource: Source: based on the Diyanet (Presidency of Religious Affairs).
xt.tsCompleteBody: May Allah accept your worship. You completed 33 + 33 + 33 + tahlil.
xt.tvTableNote: Witr and sunnahs are separate; only fard prayers are shown.
xt.tvSourceNote: Information is based on the Hanafi school and Diyanet. When in doubt, consult a scholar.
xt.tvHeaderSubtitle: A traveler’s prayer, fasting and masah rulings
xt.zkGuideSource: Based on the Diyanet İlmihali. Consult a mufti for a ruling.
xt.zkEnterGoldPrice: Enter the gold price to calculate.
xt.zkZakatNote: Zakat applies to surplus wealth held for one lunar year. This is an estimate — consult a scholar for a ruling.
xt.zkGoldUnavailable: Live price unavailable — enter the gold price manually.
xt.zkFitraNote: Fitra is given before the Eid prayer. The per-person amount is Diyanet’s current figure; you can edit it.
xt.zkFitraUnavailable: Could not fetch fitra — enter the amount manually.
xt.zkPrivacyNote: Privacy: The amounts you enter are used only on this device for instant calculation — they are not saved, sent, or synced anywhere.
xt.zkSourceNote: Source: based on the Diyanet İşleri Başkanlığı catechism. Consult authorized sources for details.
